_note: Connects Charlemagne's branch (which floats free of the medieval mainstream) DOWN to it. The Counts of Vermandois were Carolingians: Charlemagne -> Pepin of Italy -> Bernard -> Pepin of Vermandois -> Herbert I -> Beatrice of Vermandois, who married Robert I of France (already in the main tree). This documented line merges antiquity->Carolingians into the one tree that reaches the Tudors. Ordered child-first so references resolve.
